scripts.dev: npm run services:up && npm run wait-for-postgres && npm run migration:up && next dev
scripts.services:wait:database: docker compose -f infra/compose.yaml exec -T database pg_isready -U postgres
scripts.test: npm run services:up && npm run wait-for-postgres && npm run migration:up && start-server-and-test "npm exec -- next dev -p 4000" http://localhost:4000 "NINJA_ENV=parentDisabled node node_modules/jest-cli/bin/jest.js --runInBand" && npm run services:down
scripts.test:ci: npm run migration:up && start-server-and-test "npm exec -- next dev -p 4000" http://localhost:4000 "NINJA_ENV=parentDisabled node node_modules/jest-cli/bin/jest.js --runInBand"
scripts.test:watch: npm run services:up && npm run wait-for-postgres && npm run migration:up && start-server-and-test "npm exec -- next dev -p 4000" http://localhost:4000 "NINJA_ENV=parentDisabled node node_modules/jest-cli/bin/jest.js --watchAll --runInBand" && npm run services:down
